overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V featuring a female character exploring the exterior of the iconic pink Royal Hawaiian Hotel. The character descends stone steps onto a grassy lawn while the camera orbits around her, showcasing the building's distinctive arches and signage in bright tropical sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance steps and front lawn

events.description: character stands up from sitting position on the stone steps
character walks down steps from shaded entrance area onto sunlit grassy lawn

agents.ego_description: female character in white blouse and dark trousers standing up from the steps and walking down onto the hotel lawn

entered.detail: Wide pink stone steps leading up to the hotel entrance platform
Large multi-story pink historic hotel building with multiple windows and balconies
Row of large rounded arches forming the covered walkway entrance
Well-maintained green grass lawn dotted with small white and yellow flowers

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character sitting on wide stone steps beneath the hotel entrance. She stands and walks down onto the grassy lawn as the camera orbits clockwise, revealing the iconic pink facade and arched colonnade of the Royal Hawaiian building behind her.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel front lawn beneath Royal Hawaiian signage

events.description: character pauses briefly to look up at the building facade and signage

agents.ego_description: character walking along the front of the hotel property, admiring the architecture while the camera circles around her

entered.detail: Elegant cursive signage reading Royal Hawaiian mounted on the building facade above the arches

segments.scene_description: The character explores the sunlit front lawn of the hotel, with the camera continuing its clockwise orbit. The Royal Hawaiian signage becomes prominently visible on the pink facade as the character pauses to look up at the architecture, while the stone steps fall behind view.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel side wing lawn with mature tree

events.description: character moves from the main arched facade to the simpler side wing of the building
character turns and walks back toward the main entrance arches

agents.ego_description: character walking around the side of the hotel near a large tree, then turning to walk back toward the main entrance area

entered.detail: Mature green tree with full canopy standing on the lawn near the hotel side wing
Simpler pink building facade without arches, featuring vertical support columns

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward the hotel's side wing where a large tree stands on the lawn, temporarily leaving the arched entrance behind. After reaching the side area, she turns and walks back toward the main entrance, with the arches reappearing in the frame as the camera continues its orbit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera orbit around a character as she moves from the hotel's stone entrance across a bright, sunlit lawn. It begins with the character standing from a seated position on wide stone steps and descending onto the grass, while the camera circles clockwise to reveal the iconic pink facade and arched colonnade of the Royal Hawaiian. As she explores the open lawn, the camera continues its rotation, shifting the focus from the steps to the prominent hotel signage displayed against the architecture. The scene then expands as she walks toward a large tree by the side wing, momentarily leaving the main entrance behind before turning back toward the building. Finally, the camera completes its orbit as the character returns toward the center, bringing the distinctive arches back into full view.
